7GUIs Counter - lit-html

App

Bundles

BundleMinifiedGzipBrotli
index.js13.5 kB3.61 kB3.14 kB

Source

  • index.js
import { html, render } from "lit-html";

const Counter = (count, increment) => html`
	<button
		class="btn badge"
		data-badge=${count}
		style="margin-top: 0.5rem;"
		@click=${increment}
	>
		count: ${count}
	</button>
`;

const container = document.getElementById("app");

function update(count) {
	const increment = () => update(count + 1);
	render(Counter(count, increment), container);
}

update(0);

Built with ♥ by Andre Wiggins. Styled using Spectre.css
